response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with roughly 19 years of hands-on experience, meeting the raw tenure requirement, and shows early AI-adjacent work (MCP code generators, agentic tooling). However, the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows no recognized AI expertise, no shipped AI products or platforms, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of operating at principal/director scope — influence appears limited to team-level engineering and community workshops rather than organization-wide or industry-level technical leadership.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform used by a real NGO community
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI/ML expertise or AI-powered products at meaningful scale
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC — no evidence of principal-level strategic scope, executive advising, or cross-org influence
Lacks the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field and deep cloud-platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth vs. role requirements
Seniority gap (senior IC vs. director-level scope)
Long, diverse engineering tenure with startup/founder experience
